title: Eldritch Blast
contents: text | A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range.
text | *(Note: If target is Hexed, add 1d6 Necrotic)*

title: Friends
contents: text | For the duration, you have **Advantage** on all Charisma checks directed at one creature of your choice that isn't hostile toward you.
text | *(2024 Rule: The target does NOT become hostile when this spell ends).*

title: Burning Hands
contents: text | As you hold your hands with thumbs touching and fingers spread, a thin sheet of flames shoots forth.
text | *Ignites flammable objects that aren't worn or carried.*

title: Command
contents: text | You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see. If it fails its save, it follows the command on its next turn.
text | *Common commands: Halt, Drop, Flee, Grovel.*
text | *Undead and creatures that don't understand you are immune.*

title: Armor of Agathys
contents: text | A protective magical force surrounds you, manifesting as a spectral frost that covers you and your gear.
text | **Benefit:** You gain 5 Temporary Hit Points.
text | **Retaliation:** If a creature hits you with a melee attack while you have these hit points, it takes **5 Cold Damage**.

title: Hex
contents: text | You place a curse on a creature you can see. Until the spell ends, you deal extra damage when you hit it with an attack.
text | **Debuff:** Target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with one stat of your choice.
text | **Re-cast:** If the target drops to 0 HP, use a Bonus Action on a subsequent turn to move the hex to a new creature.

title: Misty Step
contents: text | Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.
text | *Great for escaping melee combat without triggering an opportunity attack, or bypassing locked gates/bars you can see through.*

title: Command Xil
contents: property | Requirement | Xil must be within 100 ft.
text | You command your familiar, Xil, to take the **Attack** action on its turn.
text | *(Note: In 2024, Xil rolls his own initiative and takes his turn independently, but needs this command to attack).*

title: Hellish Rebuke
contents: property | Trigger | You take damage from a creature you can see within 60 ft.
text | You point your finger, and the creature that damaged you is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames.

title: Xil (Imp) Actions
contents: subtitle | Pact of the Chain Familiar
property | Defenses | Resist: Cold/Weapon, Immune: Fire/Poison
text | **Invisibility (Action):** Magically turn Invisible until he attacks or concentration ends.
text | **Shapechanger (Action):** Polymorph into a Raven (50ft Fly), Rat (20ft Walk), or Spider (20ft Climb). Retains all stats but cannot attack.
text | **Help (Action):** Distracts a target within 5ft. Gives Brenya Advantage on her next attack against it. *(Does NOT break Invisibility).*
